nasb.text: For to one is given the word of wisdom through the Spirit, and to another the word of knowledge according to the same Spirit;

esv.text: For to one is given through the Spirit the utterance of wisdom, and to another the utterance of knowledge according to the same Spirit,

cnv.text: 有人藉著聖靈領受了智慧的言語，又有人靠著同一位聖靈領受了知識的言語，

ccb.text: 这人从圣灵领受智言，那人从圣灵领受知识；

csbs.text: 有人藉着圣灵被赐予了智慧的话语， 又有人藉着同一位圣灵被赐予了知识的话语，
